name: TOP_ASSIGNEES_BY_PATHWAY_3Y
description: Top assignees by pathway last 3 years. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (ymax:Year)
WITH max(ymax.year) AS max_year
MATCH (pw:Pathway {name: $pathway})<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year >= max_year - $years + 1
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: In the last three years, within target-pair combinations related to the Metabolism of amino acids and derivatives pathway, which companies published the most patents?
In the last three years, within target-pair combinations related to the MAP2K and MAPK activation pathway, which companies published the most patents?
In the last three years, within target-pair combinations related to the Regulation of MITF-M-dependent genes involved in pigmentation pathway, which companies published the most patents?
